qemu-system-aarch64 -M raspi3b -kernel kernel8.img -serial null -serial stdio  -display none
                                            AtOS 0.1.0-dev
                     #                      ──────────────────────────────────────
                    ##                      Architecture:  AArch64
                  ## #                      CPU:           Cortex-A53
                ##   #                      EL:            EL1 → EL0
              ## :#| #                      MMU:           ✓ (39-bit 2 Level VA space)
            %#  = #| %                      Kernel VA:     0xFFFF_FF80_0008_0000
          =%* =-  =| %                      Scheduler:     Round Robin
        +%# ==    =| %                      Timer:         PhysicalNonSecure
       %% ==      =| %%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%  IO:            Mini UART
     %% ===========|=================-  %   Build:         2026-07-06 22:31:55
   %% =+          =| /===\ /===        %    Rust:          rustc 1.94.1 (e408947bf 2026-03-25)
 %% :+            =| +   = \==\      %%     Repository:    https://github.com/ZackyGameDev/AtOS
#%#               +| \===/ ===/    %%+      Documentation: https://zackygamedev.github.io/RustOSGuideforRPi3/
   ############*% +|     %%********         git hash:      322445f
                % +|   %%               
                % +| %%                 
                %  %%                   
                 %%
